query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "count!: i64"
            FROM webhooks w
            WHERE w.active = 1
            AND (
                w.project_id IS NULL
                OR w.project_id = (
                    SELECT t.project_id
                    FROM execution_processes ep
                    JOIN task_attempts ta ON ep.task_attempt_id = ta.id
                    JOIN tasks t ON ta.task_id = t.id
                    WHERE ep.id = $1
                )
            )
